CRYO-GEN Competitive Riders Young & Old - Contact: https://linktr.ee/CRYO_GEN Team CRYO-GEN is a premier esports cycling team on Zwift, uniting riders from around the world who share a passion for racing, training, and community. Our athletes compete at the highest level in Zwift Racing League and other premier events, proudly representing CRYO-GEN at the sharp end of the peloton. But CRYO-GEN is more than just elite racing — it’s a global community. We welcome riders of all ages, categories, and experience levels, offering group rides, endurance events, and support to help everyone reach their goals. At CRYO-GEN, we value teamwork, fair play, and camaraderie. Whether you’re chasing podiums or looking for friendships on the road to fitness, you’ll find a home here. Team CRYO-GEN ¯_(ツ)_/¯ =========================================== We hope that Team CRYO-GEN is the future, train with us and when the time is right be released from your animated state and take races and rides by storm. ========================
